# Announcing the Finalists of the Growth Marketing Awards - Iterable

## Announcing the Finalists of the Growth Marketing Awards

**Published by**

March 15, 2018

![The Growth Marketing Awards Finalists](https://iterable.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/031418_Activate-Finalists.png)

In three weeks, taking place April 2-3 in San Francisco, Iterable will celebrate the achievements of our amazing customers at Activate, our debut omni-channel marketing conference. In addition to the insightful sessions, valuable networking opportunities, and fun activities planned during this event, we’ll also be recognizing the finalists and winners of the Growth Marketing Awards.

Iterable’s Growth Marketing Awards were created to recognize marketers that are leveraging Iterable to power personalized omni-channel relevance at scale.

We received many fantastic submissions for each of the five categories:

*   Growth Marketing Team of the Year
*   Most Captive Audience
*   Best Omni-Channel Campaign
*   Most Impactful Transition to Iterable
*   Most Sophisticated Use of Workflow Studio

Check out our infographic below to view our finalists! We’re honored to work with these leading brands, building the creative, innovative campaigns that keep consumers engaged around the world.

![Infographic on finalists of the Growth Marketing Awards](https://iterable.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/03/Activate_Finalist_Infographic_L1R3.png)

Many of these finalists are slated to speak at Activate, so view the full agenda to see what’s in store.

Registration closes on Friday, Mar. 23, and attendance is limited, so sign up today to rub shoulders with these world-class brands!
